name: Picnic Syndrome
short_description: Nutopia is now booting... Picnic syndrome is a Meta puzzle game with light horror elements featuring file manipulation. Exploring "Nutopia" with Teddy the bear and hanging out with Vincent the wolf pup!
detailed_description:
Nutopia is now booting...

Story:

Teddy is an artificial intelligence commissioned to start testing the virtual world "Nutopia" while also testing another new artificial intelligence, Vincent the wolf pup.
However, as Teddy's testing progresses, it seems to be more than just testing.

It has became a game.

Following in the footsteps of Teddy, let's explore Nutopia's secrets, dive into the story of its owner, and hang out with Vincent along the way!

Features:

  • Puzzles both in-game and out-of-game.
  • An unique file system.
  • Inventory system that linked to the file system.
  • Mini-games.
  • Randomized micro-horror elements.
  • pleh ruoy sdeen ehS

Note:

  • This game involves a large amount of file reading and writing.
